places.name: Tuwaiq Palace Heart Tent
places.description: This mesmerizing, colorful structure looks like a tent made from stained glass.

places.name: Al Masmak Fortress
places.description: A 19th-century fortress and collection of artifacts offer a tour of Saudi history.

places.name: Al Janadriyah Festival
places.description: An annual two-week festival near the city of Riyadh when Saudis let their hair down.
